case_title: STOCK BABETTE ELESE VS KEELEY PHILLIP

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF JUN-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY STOCK BABETTE ELESE AS TO DEFENDANT KEELEY PHILLIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CASE WAS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 2, SAME JUDGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOCK BABETTE ELESE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEELEY PHILLIP $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $708.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
